span.p: Does an existing risk register entry cover this risk

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Has the inherent or residual rating changed due to the event

span.p: Is residual risk above appetite after controls are applied

span.p: Add action plan - named owner - 30-day target - interim flag
